case_title: STRACHAN FRAN DBA ZIA COSMETICS VS MISTHOS HARRY DBA FJS BLACKHAWK MKT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $527.51 FILED BY STRACHAN FRAN DBA ZIA COSMETICS AS TO DEFENDANT MISTHOS HARRY DBA FJS BLACKHAWK MKT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
POS NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG DATE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STRACHAN FRAN DBA ZIA COSMETICS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISTHOS HARRY DBA FJS BLACKHAWK MKT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
